name_cn:
Top-tier factory, complete packaging
Mini in stock!!️
D-Joy bag cowhide diamond pattern matte 2023 model, brand new diamond quilted, high-quality cowhide embossing, paired with matte hardware, fashion is truly cyclical, returning to a vintage Lady D-Joy, strong retro chic feel, suitable for any occasion 🥳
Size: 16*5.5*10cm
